violations.text: Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the toilet room. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2025
The hand-washing sink in the toilet room was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (knives, scoops, sauce containers) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2025

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings throughout kitchen. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of rodent droppings. 1. Handwash sink ledge 2. Counter 3. Shelving New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2025
Dish cloth and sponge pad were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2023

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings throughout kitchen and the cabinet shelves. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2023
Various food product were observed stored on the floor in the kitchen area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2023
Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the kitchen area. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the kitchen area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2023
